title: streptanthus glandulosus subsp. arkii
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. arkii, also known as Ark's tower mustard or Arkansas tower mustard, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. arkii are often extracted through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions. However, more research is needed to fully understand the efficacy and safety of using this plant for medicinal purposes.
